creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
Eel compiles but fails to properly link to gnome-vfs et al. because
	of PTHREAD issues.

	With this patch, Eel builds/installs and Nautilus RUNS on -STABLE!!

Fix: Only the top-level Makefile needs to be patched.  diff -ruN follows:
How-To-Repeat: 	Eel will fail to fully build/install without this patch.
